settings.text: Say goodbye to sparse, uneven brows and hello to a fuller, perfectly defined look. The Tattoo Brow Pen uses a precision microblade tip to create realistic, hair-like strokes that blend seamlessly with your natural brows. Whether you're getting ready for school, a day out, or a special event, it gives you salon-quality results in just moments—no skills or appointments needed.

settings.title: Buy More Save More
settings.trust_note: Free delivery on orders over $50 · Pay on delivery

settings.title: How to Use
settings.subtitle: No training needed. Just follow your natural shape.
settings.step_1_desc: Using the fine black tip, lightly outline your natural brow shape. Start from the inner corner and follow your arch.
settings.step_1_tip: Use light pressure — you can always build up, not take away
settings.step_2_desc: Switch to the 4-pronged brown microblade tip. Draw short upward strokes in the direction of hair growth to fill sparse areas.
settings.step_2_tip: Work in layers — 2-3 light passes look more natural than one heavy stroke
settings.step_3_desc: Use a spoolie to lightly comb through for a seamless, natural finish. The formula sets in seconds — waterproof, smudge-proof, all day.
settings.step_3_tip: Pair with the eyeliner tip for a full eye look in under 5 minutes
